description: Confounder: The model assumes the norm layer never has learnable parameters, but assigning a

_meta.explanation: The rule 'AdaLayerNormZero's norm layer has no learnable parameters, so its state_dict contains only the linear projection weights and biases.' does NOT hold here. The model assumes the norm layer never has learnable parameters, but assigning a weight parameter manually adds a learnable parameter to the norm layer.
_meta.curriculum_note: Rule 'AdaLayerNormZero's norm layer has no learnable parameters, so its state_dict contains only the linear projection weights and biases.' holds in the obvious case but breaks here. Distractor B is the hard negative — the rule naively applied.
